case_title: TARUN MEHTA VS. CECILIA KIM VU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEHTA, TARUN AS TO DEFENDANT VU, CECILIA KIM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: 300.00 SERVED MAR-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VU, CECILIA KIM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEHTA, TARUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VU, CECILIA KIM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,725.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000.00 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MEHTA, TARUN AS TO DEFENDANT VU, CECILIA KIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 07/28/16 AS TO DEFENDANT VU, CECILIA KIM
